name: Eyes of Azrael
description:
Discover the legendary heroes, warriors, and mortal champions.

Heroes - Jewish Mythology
            World Mythos Home |
            Jewish Tradition

keyMyths.title: The Search for the Lost Sefer Torah of Sinai
keyMyths.description: When a sacred Sefer Torah, believed to contain the original teachings given at Sinai, vanishes, Eyes of Azrael embarks on a perilous journey through forgotten synagogues and treacherous deserts to recover it, facing trials of faith and cunning.

keyMyths.title: The Binding of the Golem of Prague's Fury
keyMyths.description: A powerful Golem, created to protect the Jewish community of Prague, goes berserk, threatening the city. Eyes of Azrael must use ancient Kabbalistic knowledge and his own strength to restrain the creature and restore peace.
keyMyths.source: Legends of the Golem, revised edition

keyMyths.title: The Defeat of the Lilith's Shadow
keyMyths.description: A malevolent entity, a shadow of Lilith, begins to corrupt the dreams of the righteous, sowing discord and despair. Eyes of Azrael ventures into the realm of dreams to confront the shadow and sever its influence, facing his own deepest fears.
keyMyths.source: The Book of Raziel Hemel, commentary

keyMyths.title: The Retrieval of the Shem HaMephorash from the Angel of Forgetfulness
keyMyths.description: The Ineffable Name of God, the Shem HaMephorash, is stolen by an angel consumed by forgetfulness, threatening to erase creation. Eyes of Azrael must navigate the celestial realms, battling corrupted angels and confronting the angel's grief to recover the Name.

keyMyths.title: The Negotiation with the Leviathan's Wrath
keyMyths.description: The Leviathan, a primordial sea monster, stirs from its slumber, its rage threatening to flood the world. Eyes of Azrael, guided by prophecy, must descend into the depths of the ocean and negotiate with the Leviathan, offering a sacrifice of humility to appease its wrath.

achievements: Recovered the Lost Sefer Torah of Sinai
Bound the Golem of Prague and prevented its destruction
Banished Lilith's Shadow from the realm of dreams
Retrieved the Shem HaMephorash from the Angel of Forgetfulness
Appeased the Leviathan and prevented a catastrophic flood
Mastered the art of dream walking
Negotiated peace between warring factions of angels

sources.name: The Talmud
sources.description: A central text of Rabbinic Judaism, containing discussions and interpretations of Jewish law and ethics.
sources.title: The Talmud

sources.name: The Zohar
sources.description: A foundational text of Kabbalah, exploring the mystical aspects of Judaism.
sources.title: The Zohar

sources.name: Pirkei Avot (Ethics of the Fathers)
sources.description: A compilation of ethical teachings and sayings from Jewish sages.
sources.title: Pirkei Avot (Ethics of the Fathers)

sources.name: Midrash Rabbah
sources.description: A collection of homiletical commentaries on the Hebrew Bible.
sources.title: Midrash Rabbah

sources.name: Legends of the Jews by Louis Ginzberg
sources.description: A comprehensive collection of Jewish folklore and legends from various sources.
sources.title: Legends of the Jews by Louis Ginzberg
